title: taraxacum coronatum
intro: Taraxacum coronatum, also known as the crownless dandelion, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum coronatum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum coronatum can be consumed as teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
